summary: Iteration 20: Tested Newsroom Block Editor bug fix - article.blocks rendering correctly on public detail page. 18/19 backend tests passed (1 skipped). All frontend block types (text, quote, alert, table) rendering correctly.

issues: Minor console warning: <span> cannot be child of <option>/<select> - React hydration warning, does not affect functionality

backend_api: GET /api/articles - Returns articles with blocks array
POST /api/articles - Creates article with blocks (text, quote, image, alert, table types)
PUT /api/articles/:id/autosave - Works with blocks, returns {ok: true, saved_at}
GET /api/my-articles/stats - Returns correct stats (total, published, drafts, scheduled, views, likes)
Article creation with SEO fields (slug, meta_title, meta_description)
Article creation with breaking news flag
Draft article creation - published_at is null
Word count and reading time computed from blocks
frontend_ui: Article detail page renders text blocks as HTML content with formatting
Article detail page renders quote blocks with text and author
Article detail page renders alert blocks (info=blue, warning=yellow, success=green)
Article detail page renders table blocks with headers and rows
Article detail page shows subtitle field (data-testid='article-subtitle')
Article detail page shows reading time (data-testid='article-reading-time')
Article detail page falls back to legacy HTML content for old articles
Article form page (editor) loads correctly at /admin/nouvelle
Block editor shows all 6 block types: text, image, video, quote, alert, table
Block picker opens and closes correctly
Text block rich editor has formatting toolbar (Bold, Italic, Underline, Alignment, Lists, Link)
Existing article c0f6db40-d6ac-45cd-b2a5-b975b5f020a5 renders text and quote blocks correctly

critical_code_review_comments: BlockRenderer component in ArticleDetailPage.js correctly checks article.blocks first before falling back to legacy content
All 6 block types (text, image, video, quote, alert, table) have dedicated render functions with proper data-testid attributes
Alert block styling correctly maps type (info/warning/success) to colors (blue/yellow/green)
Table block renders headers and rows with proper styling
BlockEditor.js properly handles all block types with corresponding edit components
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration20_newsroom.py (fixed invalid category names: Economie→Économie, Culture→Actualité, Sante→Sport, International→Politique, Environnement→Technologie)

success_rate.backend: 95% (18/19 passed, 1 skipped - auteur role test skipped due to registration flow)

seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed articles created during pytest run and cleaned up after tests. Created test article with all 6 block types for frontend verification - deleted after test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 validated critical bug fix: ArticleDetailPage.js now renders article.blocks array instead of empty content string. BlockRenderer component handles all 6 block types with proper styling. Valid categories are: ['Actualité', 'Politique', 'Sport', 'Technologie', 'Économie'].
